title: Giant Super Shape Foil Balloons XL Large Children's Birthday Party (Green Dragon 36")
features: Another Quality item under license from Tri Products
Each balloon is fitted with a self sealing valve, no need to heat seal.
These balloons will come flat and can be inflated with either air or helium.
Perfect addition to your themed birthday party or for general everyday fun
